roles.title: Founder & Systems Engineer
roles.description:
- Built and administered Nexus (fintech platform) with PostgreSQL-backed data models, SQL query optimisation, and encrypted transaction handling.
- Maintained HomeLab and server infrastructure using Docker containers, service monitoring, and repeatable configuration baselines for operational reliability.
- Automated operational workflows for deployments, data sync, and incident response runbooks to improve recovery speed and service continuity.

roles.title: AI Code Analyst / Software Developer – AI Trainer
roles.description:
- Evaluated and refactored AI-generated code in multiple languages (including Python and JavaScript) to improve logic, enforce best practices, and ensure correctness.
- Assessed and rated the quality of Large Language Model (LLM) responses against complex rubrics, comparing multiple outputs for accuracy, helpfulness, and safety.
- Developed targeted coding challenges and unit tests designed to evaluate the reasoning and real-world problem-solving capabilities of AI models.
- Analyzed and debugged complex functions to identify logic errors and tested the model's ability to correctly utilize real-world tools like APIs and command-line interfaces.

roles.title: Lead Software Engineer | AI Systems
roles.description:
- Architected and built the Magnet AI Agents platform, deploying bespoke voice and chat agents that automate client intake, qualify leads, and resolve support tickets, directly reducing non-billable hours for service-based businesses.
- Led the development of the Magnet CRM, white-label, all-in-one sales OS designed to be fully branded and launched for clients in under 7 days.
- Engineered and implemented the proprietary SPARC methodology, an AI-assisted development workflow that reduces build times for complex web applications by up to 75% compared to traditional agency models.
- Directed the technical vision for all client projects and internal ventures, ensuring every system built is scalable, secure, and focused on delivering measurable business outcomes.

roles.title: Duty Store Manager (Operational Compliance)
roles.description:
- Executed operational governance procedures using documented checklists, compliance controls, and audit-ready recordkeeping.
- Applied standard operating procedures to maintain consistent, policy-aligned execution across shift-critical tasks.
- Monitored adherence to regulatory and internal requirements, escalating non-conformances through defined governance channels.

roles.title: Operations Technology Platform (OTP) Manager
roles.description:
- Maintained 99% uptime across mission-critical POS, back-office, and network systems through proactive diagnostics and preventative maintenance.
- Managed server hardware maintenance cycles and software patch scheduling to keep production systems secure and stable.
- Troubleshot network protocols and POS infrastructure faults, restoring service rapidly under high-pressure trading windows.

roles.title: Assistant Business Manager
roles.description:
- Optimised operational workflows and managed system resources supporting QSC&V execution, shift throughput, and service continuity.
- Maintained procedural controls for daily platform readiness, incident logging, and escalation to technical support channels.

roles.title: Assistant Restaurant Manager
roles.description:
- Managed daily operations for a high-volume restaurant environment, consistently delivering strong KPI performance across service speed and customer outcomes.
- Established operating procedures and managed system resources during two new-site launches to ensure stable opening readiness.
- Recognised with over 12 performance awards for operational excellence; implemented inventory controls that reduced food waste by 15%.
